content.content: First gained fame in 2016 after he joined the cast of History channel's Vikings as Ivar the Boneless. He also had a recurring role in the Danish series Tvillingerne & Julemanden. He made his acting debut in the Danish television series Scenen Er Din. In 2015, he led the Danish drama A War as Anders Holm. He was born and raised in Denmark to Thomas Andersen and Charlotte Hogh. He has a sister named Aila. In the hit series Vikings, he joined fellow starsGustaf SkarsgardandKatheryn Winnick.
